title: rosa corymbifera subsp. deseglisei
intro: Rosa corymbifera subsp. deseglisei, also known as the 'Deseglise' rose, is a subspecies of the Rosa corymbifera species, a type of wild rose native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa corymbifera subsp. deseglisei include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as offering antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
